notes: Mobility Sweden bundles EX40 + XC40 ICE/PHEV but market_models.csv is pre-filtered to fuel_type_raw=EL; all rows are EV variant. Deterministic rule: brand=VOLVO && model=EX/XC40 && fuel_type=EL -> Volvo EX40.

Bundled sedan + Tourer. Sedan treated as primary canonical; registration count attributed to ID.7 family. Tourer added as secondary canonical with own URLs but 0 attributed registrations until VIN-level split possible. Safe to automap as primary; Tourer extraction must use separate row.

Same EV-only filter logic as EX/XC40. Deterministic rule: brand=VOLVO && model=EC/C40 && fuel_type=EL -> Volvo EC40.
Mercedes sells CLA ICE/MHEV and CLA with EQ Technology (full EV). EL filter eliminates ICE rows. Deterministic rule: brand=MERCEDES && model=CLA && fuel_type=EL -> Mercedes-Benz CLA EQ.
